nodes.context: Corsican organized crime group involved in extortion, drug trafficking, money laundering, and political infiltration.
Corsican criminal coalition rivaling the Petit Bar Gang, bringing together groups from different regions.
Corsican nationalist political movement, formerly led by Alain Orsoni, involved in rivalry with Petit Bar Gang.

edges.context: The Petit Bar Gang and the Mattei clan are the two dominant blocs in Corsican organized crime, with a fragile balance of power.
The Petit Bar Gang is suspected of assassination attempts against Alain Orsoni and his son Guy Orsoni, former leaders of the MPA.
